{"query":"Trump says very close to a deal Gaza ceasefire negotiations three days indirect talks Egypt prisoner exchange lists assurances latest","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1627,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cdjzvlxp8mjo","title":"Progress in Gaza peace talks as Trump says 'very close to deal'","content":"US President Donald Trump has said he has been informed "we are very close to a deal" to end the war in Gaza, after officials reported progress after a third day of indirect talks between Israel and Hamas in Egypt.
According to the Palestinian official, there has been good progress on the prisoner-exchange lists and on guarantees to prevent a return to fighting.
Representatives from two other Palestinian armed groups, Islamic Jihad and the Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine (PFLP), were also present at talks.
The official said disagreements had emerged over nearly all the key issues, including the map showing the three phases of Israeli troop withdrawals from Gaza, and the timetable for the hostage-prisoner exchange.
The ministry has said another 460 people have died from the effects of malnutrition since the start of the war, including 182 since a famine was confirmed in Gaza City in August by the UN-backed Integrated Food Security Phase Classification (IPC)."},{"url":"https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/oct/04/trump-gaza-peace-deal","title":"US envoys head to Egypt for Gaza ceasefire talks as Trump says ‘we are very close’ to deal | Donald Trump | The Guardian","content":"Donald Trump’s son-in-law and a senior envoy are heading to Egypt to begin ceasefire negotiations, the White House has said, as the Israeli prime minister, Benjamin Netanyahu, said he hoped to bring all remaining hostages home in the coming days.
A White House official said the US president was sending his envoys, Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff, to Egypt on Saturday to finalise the technical details of a hostage release and discuss a lasting ceasefire deal a day after Hamas said it was ready to free hostages under Trump’s plan to end the two-year war.
Now we will need to close it.”"},{"url":"https://www.aa.com.tr/en/americas/trump-says-he-may-visit-middle-east-this-weekend-as-gaza-ceasefire-talks-going-very-well-/3711822","title":"Trump says he may visit Middle East this weekend as Gaza ceasefire talks going ‘very well’","content":"US President Donald Trump said Wednesday that he may travel to the Middle East this weekend as negotiations for a ceasefire in Gaza are showing signs of progress."},{"url":"https://www.france24.com/en/middle-east/20251012-gaza-live-trump-gaza-war-israel-release-hostages","title":"‘We have peace in the Middle East,’ Trump tells Gaza summit in Egypt - France 24","content":"Speaking with FRANCE 24’s Mark Owen, Alon Pinkas, former Israeli diplomat and political advisor to Shimon Peres and Ehud Barak, says that for the peace plan for Gaza to work it needs “Trump’s continued commitment”.
US President Donald Trump headed back to Washington Monday after a lightning trip to Egypt and Israel to seek a long-term Gaza peace settlement.
"This is not only the end of a war ..."},{"url":"https://www.theguardian.com/world/2025/oct/08/optimism-grows-for-gaza-peace-deal-as-top-us-qatari-and-turkish-officials-join-talks","title":"Trump says Gaza peace deal ‘very close’ and he may travel to Middle East in days | Israel-Gaza war | The Guardian","content":"There is a very good chance, negotiations are going very well.”
White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt later said in a statement that was “considering” travel to the Middle East after a visit to Walter Reed hospital in Washington DC on Friday morning.
The US Middle East envoy, Steve Witkoff, and Jared Kushner, Trump’s son-in-law, were joined by the Qatari prime minister, Sheikh Mohammed bin Abdulrahman Al Thani, and the head of Turkish intelligence, Ibrahim Kalin.
The presence of the senior officials from the three countries brought further hope that this round of talks could result in a deal, even as significant gaps remained between the two sides.
“Good progress has been made today,” the US secretary of state, Marco Rubio, told reporters in Washington DC.
A growing number of bodies, including the UN commission of inquiry, have concluded that Israel has committed genocide in its two-year war in Gaza."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Trump says very close to a deal Gaza ceasefire negotiations three days indirect talks Egypt prisoner exchange lists assurances latest","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cdjzvlxp8mjo","title":"Progress in Gaza peace talks as Trump says 'very close to deal'","content":"# Progress in Gaza peace talks as Trump says 'very close to deal'. US President Donald Trump has said he has been informed \"we are very close to a deal\" to end the war in Gaza, after officials reported progress after a third day of indirect talks between Israel and Hamas in Egypt. Wednesday's talks focused on the first phase of a US peace plan that includes a ceasefire, the release of all hostages in Gaza in exchange for Palestinian prisoners, and Israel's withdrawal from parts of Gaza. Trump said that note informed him that \"we are very close to a deal\". A senior Hamas official told the BBC on Wednesday morning that it had shown \"the necessary positivity\" in the negotiations and submitted a list of the prisoners it wants Israel to release in exchange for the 48 hostages still held in Gaza, up to 20 of whom are still alive.","score":0.98578,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/oct/04/trump-gaza-peace-deal","title":"US envoys head to Egypt for Gaza ceasefire talks as Trump says ‘we are very close’ to deal | Donald Trump | The Guardian","content":"# US envoys head to Egypt for Gaza ceasefire talks as Trump says ‘we are very close’ to deal. Donald Trump’s son-in-law and a senior envoy are heading to Egypt to begin ceasefire negotiations, the White House has said, as the Israeli prime minister, Benjamin Netanyahu, said he hoped to bring all remaining hostages home in the coming days. A White House official said the US president was sending his envoys, Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff, to Egypt on Saturday to finalise the technical details of a hostage release and discuss a lasting ceasefire deal a day after Hamas said it was ready to free hostages under Trump’s plan to end the two-year war. Separately, Trump said in an interview with Axios on Saturday that “we are very close” to a deal in Gaza and that was he pushing to finalize an agreement between Israel and Hamas in the coming days.","score":0.98429,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.cbsnews.com/news/trump-gaza-peace-deal-negotiations-israel-hamas","title":"Trump urges Gaza peace deal negotiators to \"move fast\" as ...","content":"Oct 5, 2025 — Trump urged negotiators set to meet Monday for crucial talks aimed at ending the war in Gaza to \"move fast\" as hopes for a peace deal grew","score":0.97828,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://news.sky.com/story/hostage-release-talks-imminent-to-kickstart-gaza-peace-deal-13445201","title":"Donald Trump urges Gaza peace talks 'move fast' or ' ...","content":"Oct 6, 2025 — Egypt has agreed to host discussions today, which also aim to iron out Hamas's reservations over Donald Trump's 20-point peace plan.Read more","score":0.97467,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.cbc.ca/news/world/livestory/recap-trump-mediators-sign-gaza-peace-deal-as-hamas-israel-release-hostages-and-prisoners-9.6936751","title":"RECAP | Trump, mediators sign Gaza peace deal as Hamas, Israel release hostages and prisoners | CBC","content":"##### Quick Links. # RECAP | Trump, mediators sign Gaza peace deal as Hamas, Israel release hostages and prisoners.
